notes: Dagu (Ethiopian dispensing/pharmacy logistics system) has no public machine-readable API spec. The adaptor is a generic HTTP wrapper (get/post/request). Endpoints and request/response shapes were synthesized from the adaptor's JSDoc examples: DispensingUnit/Dashboard/StockOutReport, Patient/CheckPrescription, Patient/Prescription/History (DataTables-style paging), and DispensingUnit/Request/History. Schemas are best-effort approximations of the real payloads.
